description: Style NoteA rich Scottish heritage in specialised men's apparel, Reid and Taylor unequivocally upholds the stylish vision of its founders. charcoal trousers for men, just waiting to add that extra touch of class to your wardrobe. We recommend that you pair this with a formal shirt and shoes for that hint of maturity.Product DetailsCharcoal trousers with a metal zip in front and a button fastening, two patch pockets on either side along with two side pocketsMaterial and CarePolyester viscose blend blendMachine wash coldDark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium heat steam ironSize and FitClassic fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
